make this button solid blue color and the label of the button should pass the contrast test after that @Ahmed Marwan

job.title: Make ENQUIRE NOW button solid blue with contrast-safe label

jobs.commentText: Why don't we try to make this light mode instead of dark mode @Ahmed Marwan

options.label: Warm Ivory
options.caption: Swapped the dark Navy/900 base for a warm Tone/50 background, keeping Navy as the accent for headlines and CTAs so the brand still reads grounded rather than airy.
options.aiPrompt: Recolor this frame for a light mode variant: set background fills to Tone/50 or Tone/100, keep body copy on Tone/800-900 text color styles, and reserve Navy/700-900 for headlines, buttons, and accents. Keep all existing text and paint styles local — reuse or extend the Tone/Navy style families, don't hardcode hex values.

options.label: Cool Neutral
options.caption: Used a cooler Tone/100 base with Navy/50 tints in card surfaces, so the stat blocks and forms feel crisp and gallery-like instead of warm.
options.aiPrompt: Recolor this frame for a light mode variant using a cooler palette: background Tone/100, card/section surfaces Navy/50, primary text Tone/900, secondary text Tone/600. Keep buttons and icons on existing Amber/Navy accent styles. Use only local paint and text styles by name, no hardcoded colors.

options.label: Amber-Accented Light
options.caption: Kept the base light and neutral but let Amber/500-700 carry the CTA and stat emphasis, giving the light mode a warmer focal point than a straight navy-on-white swap.
options.aiPrompt: Create a light mode variant of this frame: background Tone/50, body text Tone/800, headlines Navy/800, and shift primary CTA buttons and stat numbers to Amber/500-700 fills for emphasis. Preserve auto layout and use only named local styles, no hex or px values.

report.author: Ahmed Marwan
report.comment: change this text to "Serviced Portfolio" @Ahmed Marwan
report.rationale: Unambiguous, deterministic copy swap on a specific text layer anchored to the comment pin.

report.author: Ahmed Marwan
report.comment: make this button solid blue color and the label of the button should pass the contrast test after that @Ahmed Marwan
report.rationale: Deterministic style swap: solid blue fill style plus a contrasting text color style on the button label.
report.jobTitle: Make ENQUIRE NOW button solid blue with contrast-safe label

report.author: Ahmed Marwan
report.comment: Why don't we try to make this light mode instead of dark mode @Ahmed Marwan
report.rationale: Switching the whole page from dark to light mode is a broad visual direction change that needs palette and contrast judgment, not a deterministic op list.
